profile.name: Lohith Srinivasaiah
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.heroTagline: Designing and delivering AI-powered platforms, developer tools, and scalable backend systems.

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
roles.summary: Designing and implementing AI-powered solutions with emphasis on large language models and agentic AI systems.
achievements: Designing and implementing AI-powered solutions with emphasis on large language models and agentic AI systems
Contributing to enterprise-scale agentic workflows, prompt engineering, and LLM integration across the platform

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer (Generative-AI)
roles.summary: Led design and development of an LLM-powered chatbot for user onboarding and in-app navigation.
achievements: Architected and delivered an AI-powered chatbot using LLMs (LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Groq) to streamline user onboarding and provide contextual in-app navigation guidance
Built modular, reusable NLP components with improved prompt engineering and retrieval logic to enhance contextual understanding and response quality across user interactions
Integrated and orchestrated backend services with proper abstraction layers to improve system scalability, maintainability, and deployment flexibility

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer (Test-Automation)
roles.summary: Automated configuration and validation workflows for networking hardware, reducing manual testing effort by 60%.
achievements: Automated configuration and validation processes for routers and switches via SSH, reducing manual testing effort by 60% and enabling faster hardware qualification cycles
Developed a custom Python-based test automation framework with reusable fixtures and reporting to increase test coverage, efficiency, and reliability across networking test suites
Accelerated release cycles by improving end-to-end test coverage and streamlining validation workflows, reducing time-to-release for hardware certification

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer (Django/DRF)
roles.summary: Architected and delivered a scalable loan application platform using Django and Django REST Framework.
achievements: Architected and developed a scalable loan application platform using Django and Django REST Framework, with AWS Lambda and S3 for serverless processing and document storage
Collaborated with product, design, and QA across the full development lifecycle to deliver high-performance features on schedule and within scope
Implemented comprehensive unit and integration tests with high coverage to ensure deployment readiness and reduce production defects
Partnered with QA and DevOps to implement security best practices, code reviews, and CI/CD workflows for production-ready feature delivery

roles.title: Django/DRF Developer (Python)
roles.summary: Developed RESTful APIs and integrated Razorpay for secure payment processing at RealtyCare.
achievements: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs with Razorpay integration for secure payment processing at RealtyCare, including webhook handling, refund flows, and transaction logging
Implemented JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, and user management features to strengthen application security and support multi-tenant workflows

roles.title: Junior Software Developer (Python & GoLang)
roles.summary: Enhanced Leap Motion-based simulation tools with a custom Kabsch data fusion algorithm for natural gesture tracking and intuitive user experiences.
achievements: Integrated a custom Kabsch data fusion algorithm into Leap Motion-based simulation tools to enable accurate natural gesture tracking, reducing drift and improving the intuitiveness of user interactions
Developed Go backend modules for IPv6 networking support, following TDD practices and establishing Jenkins-based automated build and deployment pipelines for continuous delivery

roles.title: Associate Software Developer (Python)
roles.summary: Led migration of a legacy Python 2 codebase to Python 3 for the ViaSat Content Delivery System.
achievements: Led migration of a legacy Python 2 codebase to Python 3 for the ViaSat Content Delivery System, addressing compatibility issues, deprecated APIs, and updating dependencies while preserving system behavior
Introduced BDD with Behave to improve collaboration between developers and stakeholders, and to provide clear, executable specifications that doubled as living documentation
Established automated CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins for build, test, and deployment stages, enabling reliable and repeatable software releases with reduced manual intervention

bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer specializing in Python, Django, FastAPI, and LLM-powered agentic AI systems. I design and build scalable backend services and intelligent applications that address real-world challenges.
My experience spans RESTful APIs, AI chatbots, and agentic workflows. I emphasize clean architecture, maintainable code, and effective use of large language models to deliver measurable impact.
Outside of work, I stay current with AI and agent frameworks, write technical content, and contribute to the Python and AI developer community.

highlights.title: LLM & Agentic AI
highlights.description: Designing and implementing intelligent agent systems
